/bin/g++ -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/coursework.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/coursework.dir/coursework_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/coursework.dir/flightgraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/coursework.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/coursework.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/coursework.dir/pathfinder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/coursework.dir/dialog.cpp.o -o coursework  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.8.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.8.3
